allow: PowerShell(cd "e:\\AntigravityFiles\\Side\\Barangay-Profiling-Statistics"; Get-ChildItem -Force | Select-Object Name, @{Name="Type"; Expression={if \($_.PSIsContainer\) { "Folder" } else { "File" }}})
